subcodes.first_line: O thou who art young in years! Thy letter hath arrived before the divine Countenance and was perused. Praised be God, in the early days of thy life
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا صغیر السن کتابت لدی الوجه حاضر و مشاهده شد الحمد لله در اول ایام بکعبه
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @knowledge; recognition of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
